visual: Mirror of the left-side version — ward off, rollback, press, push — with weight shifting forward and back in a bow stance on the right side.
motion_description: The practitioner steps to the right into a right bow stance, rotating the torso rightward as the right arm extends horizontally at chest height. Weight shifts backward onto the left leg while the torso turns left, bringing both arms sweeping downward and across the body to the left side. The torso then rotates back to the right, shifting weight forward onto the right leg as the left palm presses against the right inner forearm to extend both arms forward. Finally, weight shifts back to the left leg, retracting the separated hands to the chest, before shifting forward again to push both palms steadily outward in a continuous flow.
